title: Secondhand property; purchase when forbidden
doc_html:
§1861.1.  Secondhand property; purchase when forbidden

No person shall willfully or knowingly purchase junk or used or secondhand property, unpaid for by the seller, or not owned by the seller.

Acts 2011, No. 389, §1.
